qa.note: dev-qa passed with 94/94 tests, lint ok, and stress ok before M82 business-flow approval link release packet

known_limitations.limitation: shell-native interface; no multi-user server yet
network probing still depends on operator authorization and local backends
graph is file-backed NDJSON, not a graph database
append-only file semantics, not immutable storage
finding records are NDJSON files; accepted-risk expiry is checked during operation readiness
validation execution is bounded by configured local backends
Markdown reports are not digitally signed
optional non-blocking pillar; no automatic flow discovery, retention links, or trust-chain integration yet
external model execution is outside Atlas

core_cli.label: Core CLI
core_cli.tests: tests/atlas.bats help and v1 status tests
core_cli.limitations: shell-native interface; no multi-user server yet

target_registry.label: Target Registry
target_registry.reason: target env records and scope metadata directory are writable
target_registry.commands: atlas target add; atlas target update; atlas target show

recon.label: Recon
recon.reason: wiremap adapter is available for operation-aware recon
recon.commands: atlas op recon; atlas recon workflow
recon.limitations: network probing still depends on operator authorization and local backends

action_planner.label: Action Planner
action_planner.reason: vector adapter is available for ranked lanes and bounded outcomes
action_planner.tests: tests/atlas.bats vector lane and action tests
action_planner.commands: atlas action candidates; atlas op action plan

intel_graph.label: Intel Graph
intel_graph.reason: intelctl adapter is available for graph and path views
intel_graph.tests: tests/atlas.bats intel graph and paths tests
intel_graph.commands: atlas intel graph; atlas intel paths
intel_graph.limitations: graph is file-backed NDJSON, not a graph database

evidence.label: Evidence
evidence.reason: hashing backend is available for artifact integrity
evidence.tests: tests/atlas.bats evidence vault and bundle tests
evidence.commands: atlas evidence add; atlas evidence bundle; atlas evidence hash
evidence.artifacts: operation evidence directory and bundle manifests

ledger.label: Ledger
ledger.reason: operation directories can hold append-only ledgers
ledger.commands: atlas op audit; atlas op status
ledger.limitations: append-only file semantics, not immutable storage

scopeguard.label: ScopeGuard
scopeguard.reason: scope profiles, approvals, and preflight state directory are available
scopeguard.commands: atlas scope status; atlas scope check

findings.label: Findings
findings.tests: tests/atlas.bats finding lifecycle and accepted-risk tests
findings.commands: atlas finding add; atlas finding update; atlas finding accept; atlas finding review; atlas finding review-queue; atlas finding review-packet; atlas finding review-verify; atlas finding resolve
findings.artifacts: operation finding index and accepted-risk review packets
findings.limitations: finding records are NDJSON files; accepted-risk expiry is checked during operation readiness

validation.label: Validation
validation.tests: tests/atlas.bats validation plan, run, and retest tests
validation.commands: atlas validation plan; atlas validation approve; atlas validation retest
validation.limitations: validation execution is bounded by configured local backends

reports.label: Reports
reports.commands: atlas op report; atlas op readiness
reports.limitations: Markdown reports are not digitally signed

retention.label: Retention
retention.reason: handoff, closeout, audit, archive, release trust, and freshness commands are available
retention.tests: tests/atlas.bats retention, archive, and release packet tests
retention.commands: atlas op closeout; atlas op audit-packet; atlas op archive-verify; atlas release packet; atlas release verify
retention.artifacts: closeout manifest, audit packet, archive packet, release trust packet

business_flow_evidence.label: Business Flow Evidence
business_flow_evidence.reason: optional metadata-only flow commands, packet generation, and verification are available; flow_records=2
business_flow_evidence.tests: tests/atlas.bats business-flow records, links, packets, verify, and readiness tests
business_flow_evidence.commands: atlas flow add; atlas flow list; atlas flow show; atlas flow link-evidence; atlas flow link-finding; atlas flow link-validation; atlas flow link-approval; atlas flow packet; atlas flow packet --json; atlas flow verify; atlas flow verify --json
business_flow_evidence.limitations: optional non-blocking pillar; no automatic flow discovery, retention links, or trust-chain integration yet

ai_advisor.label: AI Advisor
ai_advisor.reason: metadata-only advisor brief and prompt packet commands are available
ai_advisor.tests: tests/atlas.bats advisor brief and prompt tests
ai_advisor.commands: atlas advisor brief; atlas advisor prompt
ai_advisor.limitations: external model execution is outside Atlas
